questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的旧数据处理应用程序。数据按顺序处理，但结果的顺序并不重要。该应用程序使用整体架构。公司扩展应用程序以满足不断增长的需求的唯一方法是增加实例的大小。该公司的开发人员决定重写该应用程序，以使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 上的微服务架构。解决方案架构师应该为微服务之间的通信推荐什么？
question_text.en: A company has a legacy data processing application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. Data is processed sequentially, but the order of results does not matter. The application uses a monolithic architecture. The only way that the company can scale the application to meet increased demand is to increase the size of the instances. The company’s developers have decided to rewrite the application to use a microservices architecture on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). What should a solutions architect recommend for communication between the microservices?

A.zh: 创建 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。将代码添加至数据生产者，并将数据发送到队列。将代码添加至数据用户以处理来自队列的数据。
A.en: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Add code to the data producers, and send data to the queue. Add code to the data consumers to process data from the queue.

B.zh: 创建 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。向数据生产者添加代码，并向主题发布通知。向数据消费者添加代码以订阅主题。
B.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Add code to the data producers, and publish notifications to the topic. Add code to the data consumers to subscribe to the topic.

C.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数来传递消息。在数据产生器中添加代码以使用数据对象调用 Lambda 函数。向数据用户添加代码以接收从 Lambda 函数传递的数据对象。
C.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to pass messages. Add code to the data producers to call the Lambda function with a data object. Add code to the data consumers to receive a data object that is passed from the Lambda function.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon DynamoDB 数据表。启用 DynamoDB 串流。在数据产生器中添加代码以将数据插入表中。向数据用户添加代码以使用 DynamoDB Streams API 侦测新的表格条目并检索数据。
D.en: Create an Amazon DynamoDB table. Enable DynamoDB Streams. Add code to the data producers to insert data into the table. Add code to the data consumers to use the DynamoDB Streams API to detect new table entries and retrieve the data.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon SQS 是完全托管的消息队列服务，适用于异步通信场景。数据生产者将消息发送到队列，消费者从队列中拉取消息进行处理。此模式支持解耦和高吞吐量。由于数据处理的顺序并不重要，因此SQS非常适合这种场景。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon SQS is a fully managed message queue service suitable for asynchronous communication scenarios. Data producers send messages to the queue, and consumers pull messages from the queue for processing. This pattern supports decoupling and high throughput. Since the order of data processing is not important, SQS is very suitable for this scenario.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon SNS 是一种发布/订阅消息服务，适用于即时通知和广播消息。尽管SNS可以向多个订阅者发送消息，但它不支持消息持久化，消费者必须即时处理消息。这题需要异步处理，SNS不适合这种场景。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SNS is a publish/subscribe messaging service suitable for real-time notifications and broadcast messages. Although SNS can send messages to multiple subscribers, it does not support message persistence and consumers must process messages in real time. This question requires asynchronous processing, and SNS is not suitable for this scenario.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Lambda 适用于事件驱动的调度，但它不是专门设计用于消息队列的服务。使用 Lambda 传递消息会增加复杂性，且不支持消息持久化。这题需要异步处理，Lambda不适合这种场景。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Lambda is suitable for event-driven scheduling, but it is not a service specifically designed for use with message queues. Using Lambda to deliver messages adds complexity and does not support message persistence. This question requires asynchronous processing, and Lambda is not suitable for this scenario.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：DynamoDB Streams 可以侦测表格中的新条目并触发事件，但它主要用于即时处理数据变更。使用 DynamoDB 作为消息队列会增加复杂性，并且不像 SQS 那样专注于消息队列场景。这个问题需要异步处理，DynamoDB Streams 不适合这个场景。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: DynamoDB Streams can detect new entries in tables and trigger events, but it is primarily used for real-time processing of data changes. Using DynamoDB as a message queue adds complexity and is not as focused on message queue scenarios as SQS. This question requires asynchronous processing, and DynamoDB Streams is not suitable for this scenario.

answer_text.zh: A. 创建 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。将代码添加至数据生产者，并将数据发送到队列。将代码添加至数据用户以处理来自队列的数据。
answer_text.en: A. Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Add code to the data producers, and send data to the queue. Add code to the data consumers to process data from the queue.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：A (95%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon SQS 是完全托管的消息队列服务，适用于异步通信场景。数据生产者将消息发送到队列，消费者从队列中拉取消息进行处理。此模式支持解耦和高吞吐量。由于数据处理的顺序并不重要，因此SQS非常适合这种场景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (95%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon SQS is a fully managed message queue service suitable for asynchronous communication scenarios. Data producers send messages to the queue, and consumers pull messages from the queue for processing. This pattern supports decoupling and high throughput. Since the order of data processing is not important, SQS is very suitable for this scenario.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将其 MySQL 数据库从本地端迁移到 AWS。该公司最近经历了一次数据库中断，对业务产生了重大影响。为了确保这种情况不再发生，该公司希望在 AWS 上有一个可靠的数据库解决方案，最大限度地减少数据遗失并将每笔交易保存在至少两个节点上。哪种解决方案满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate its MySQL database from on premises to AWS. The company recently experienced a database outage that significantly impacted the business. To ensure this does not happen again, the company wants a reliable database solution on AWS that minimizes data loss and stores every transaction on at least two nodes. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 创建一个 Amazon RDS 数据库实例，同步复制到三个可用区中的三个节点。
A.en: Create an Amazon RDS DB instance with synchronous replication to three nodes in three Availability Zones.

B.zh: 创建启用多可用区功能的 Amazon RDS MySQL 数据库实例以同步复制数据。
B.en: Create an Amazon RDS MySQL DB instance with Multi-AZ functionality enabled to synchronously replicate the data.

C.zh: 创建 Amazon RDS MySQL 数据库实例，然后在单独的 AWS 区域中创建只读副本以同步复制数据。
C.en: Create an Amazon RDS MySQL DB instance and then create a read replica in a separate AWS Region that synchronously replicates the data.

D.zh: 创建安装了 MySQL 引擎的 Amazon EC2 实例，触发 AWS Lambda 函数将数据同步复制到 Amazon RDS MySQL 数据库实例。
D.en: Create an Amazon EC2 instance with a MySQL engine installed that triggers an AWS Lambda function to synchronously replicate the data to an Amazon RDS MySQL DB instance.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：BUG：Amazon RDS 的多可用区功能确实使用同步复制，但它没有明确让用户配置到三个节点。 RDS Multi-AZ的实作是自动的，用户无法直接选择节点数量。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: BUG: Amazon RDS's Multi-AZ feature does use synchronous replication, but it does not explicitly let users provision to three nodes. The implementation of RDS Multi-AZ is automatic, and users cannot directly select the number of nodes.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon RDS 的多可用区功能提供高可用性和数据冗余。通过同步复制确保主备实例数据一致，最大限度地减少数据遗失。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon RDS's Multi-AZ feature provides high availability and data redundancy. It ensures that data remains consistent between the primary and standby instances through synchronous replication, minimizing data loss.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon RDS 的跨区域只读副本使用异步复制，而不是同步复制。这不符合问题的「最小化数据遗失」要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon RDS's cross-region read replicas use asynchronous replication, not synchronous replication. This does not meet the "minimize data loss" requirement of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：这种情况很复杂，而且不遵循最佳实务。使用 EC2 和 Lambda 手动实现同步复制不仅会增加管理复杂性，还会导致性能问题。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This scenario is complex and does not follow best practices. Manually implementing synchronous replication using EC2 and Lambda not only adds management complexity, but can also cause performance issues.

answer_text.zh: B. 创建启用多可用区功能的 Amazon RDS MySQL 数据库实例以同步复制数据。
answer_text.en: B. Create an Amazon RDS MySQL DB instance with Multi-AZ functionality enabled to synchronously replicate the data.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：B (98%) 2%。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon RDS 的多可用区功能提供高可用性和数据冗余。通过同步复制确保主备实例数据一致，最大限度地减少数据遗失。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (98%) 2%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon RDS's Multi-AZ feature provides high availability and data redundancy. It ensures that data remains consistent between the primary and standby instances through synchronous replication, minimizing data loss.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在创建一个新的动态订购网站。该公司希望最大限度地减少服务器维护和修补。网站必须具有高可用性，并且必须尽快扩展读写容量，以满足用户需求的变化。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building a new dynamic ordering website. The company wants to minimize server maintenance and patching. The website must be highly available and must scale read and write capacity as quickly as possible to meet changes in user demand. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 Amazon S3 中托管静态内容。使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 托管动态内容。使用具有按需数据库容量的 Amazon DynamoDB。配置 Amazon CloudFront 以交付网站内容。
A.en: Host static content in Amazon S3. Host dynamic content by using Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. Use Amazon DynamoDB with on-demand capacity for the database. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver the website content.

B.zh: 在 Amazon S3 中托管静态内容。使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 托管动态内容。将 Amazon Aurora 与 Aurora Auto Scaling 结合使用作为数据库。配置 Amazon CloudFront 以交付网站内容。
B.en: Host static content in Amazon S3. Host dynamic content by using Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. Use Amazon Aurora with Aurora Auto Scaling for the database. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver the website content.

C.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 实例上托管所有网站内容。创建 Auto Scaling 组以扩展 EC2 实例。使用应用程序负载均衡器来分配流量。使用具有为数据库预置的写入容量的 Amazon DynamoDB。
C.en: Host all the website content on Amazon EC2 instances. Create an Auto Scaling group to scale the EC2 instances. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute traffic. Use Amazon DynamoDB with provisioned write capacity for the database.

D.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 实例上托管所有网站内容。创建 Auto Scaling 组以扩展 EC2 实例。使用应用程序负载均衡器来分配流量。将 Amazon Aurora 与 Aurora Auto Scaling 结合使用作为数据库。
D.en: Host all the website content on Amazon EC2 instances. Create an Auto Scaling group to scale the EC2 instances. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute traffic. Use Amazon Aurora with Aurora Auto Scaling for the database.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：S3 是托管静态内容的最佳选择，支持高可用性和低成本。使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 的动态内容：真正的无服务器架构减少了服务器维护和修补，同时实现了自动扩展。数据库使用Amazon DynamoDB的On-DemandCapacity：正确，On-DemandCapacity模式支持自动扩展，适合动态负载。使用 Amazon CloudFront：正确，CloudFront 提供全球内容分发和加速。此选项完全满足题目要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: S3 is the best choice for hosting static content, supporting high availability and low cost. Dynamic content using Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda: True, serverless architecture reduces server maintenance and patching while enabling automatic scaling. The database uses Amazon DynamoDB's On-Demand Capacity: Correct, the On-Demand Capacity mode supports automatic scaling and is suitable for dynamic loads. Use Amazon CloudFront: Correct, CloudFront provides global content distribution and acceleration. This option fully meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 的动态内容：数据库使用 Amazon Aurora 和 Aurora Auto Scaling：错误，Aurora 是关系数据库。虽然支持自动扩展，但Aurora的管理复杂度比DynamoDB更高，并不能完全满足「最小化服务器维护和修补进程」的要求。使用 Amazon CloudFront：此选项不完全符合问题要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Dynamic content using Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda: The database uses Amazon Aurora and Aurora Auto Scaling: Error, Aurora is a relational database. Although it supports automatic expansion, Aurora has higher management complexity than DynamoDB and does not fully meet the requirements of "minimizing server maintenance and patches". Using Amazon CloudFront: This option does not fully meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EC2需要手动管理服务器，增加了维护和打补丁的工作量，不符合问题的要求。创建Auto Scaling群组：正确，但是EC2的管理复杂度更高。使用应用程序负载均衡器：正确，但不符合无服务器架构。数据库使用Amazon DynamoDB的预先配置写入容量：预先配置容量模式需要手动调整，无法快速回应需求变化。该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 requires manual server management, which increases the workload of maintenance and patching, and does not meet the requirements of the question. Create an Auto Scaling group: Correct, but EC2 has higher management complexity. Use Application Load Balancer: Correct, but not compliant with serverless architecture. The database uses Amazon DynamoDB's provisioned write capacity: The provisioned capacity mode needs to be manually adjusted and cannot respond quickly to changes in demand. This option does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：与选项 C 相同，增加了维护和修补工作。创建Auto Scaling群组：正确，但是EC2的管理复杂度更高。使用应用程序负载均衡器：正确，但不符合无服务器架构。使用Amazon Aurora和Aurora Auto Scaling的数据库：错误，与选项B相同，Aurora具有更高的管理复杂性。该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: same as option C, increases maintenance and patching effort. Create an Auto Scaling group: Correct, but EC2 has higher management complexity. Use Application Load Balancer: Correct, but not compliant with serverless architecture. Database using Amazon Aurora and Aurora Auto Scaling: Wrong, same as option B, Aurora has higher management complexity. This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 Amazon S3 中托管静态内容。使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 托管动态内容。使用具有按需数据库容量的 Amazon DynamoDB。配置 Amazon CloudFront 以交付网站内容。
answer_text.en: A. Host static content in Amazon S3. Host dynamic content by using Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. Use Amazon DynamoDB with on-demand capacity for the database. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver the website content.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：A (95%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要：S3 是托管静态内容的最佳选择，支持高可用性和低成本。使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 的动态内容：真正的无服务器架构减少了服务器维护和修补，同时实现了自动扩展。数据库使用Amazon DynamoDB的On-DemandCapacity：正确，On-DemandCapacity模式支持自动扩展，适合动态负载。使用 Amazon CloudFront：正确，CloudFront 提供全球内容分发和加速。此选项完全满足题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (95%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: S3 is the best choice for hosting static content, supporting high availability and low cost. Dynamic content using Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda: True, serverless architecture reduces server maintenance and patching while enabling automatic scaling. The database uses Amazon DynamoDB's On-Demand Capacity: Correct, the On-Demand Capacity mode supports automatic scaling and is suitable for dynamic loads. Use Amazon CloudFront: Correct, CloudFront provides global content distribution and acceleration. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司拥有一个用于软件工程的 AWS 账户。 AWS 账户可以通过一对 AWS Direct Connect 连接访问公司的本机数据中心。所有非 VPC 流量都会路由到虚拟专用网关。一个开发团队最近通过控制台创建了一个 AWS Lambda 函数。开发团队需要允许该函数访问在公司数据中心的私有子网中运行的数据库。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an AWS account used for software engineering. The AWS account has access to the company’s on-premises data center through a pair of AWS Direct Connect connections. All non-VPC traffic routes to the virtual private gateway. A development team recently created an AWS Lambda function through the console. The development team needs to allow the function to access a database that runs in a private subnet in the company’s data center. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将 Lambda 函数配置为在具有适当安全组的 VPC 中运行。
A.en: Configure the Lambda function to run in the VPC with the appropriate security group.

B.zh: 设置从 AWS 到数据中心的 VPN 连接。通过 VPN 路由来自 Lambda 函数的流​​量。
B.en: Set up a VPN connection from AWS to the data center. Route the traffic from the Lambda function through the VPN.

C.zh: 更新 VPC 中的路由表，以允许 Lambda 函数通过 Direct Connect 访问本机数据中心。
C.en: Update the route tables in the VPC to allow the Lambda function to access the on-premises data center through Direct Connect.

D.zh: 创建弹性 IP 地址。配置 Lambda 函数以通过弹性 IP 地址发送流量，而无需弹性网络接口。
D.en: Create an Elastic IP address. Configure the Lambda function to send traffic through the Elastic IP address without an elastic network interface.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Lambda函数缺省运行在AWS的托管环境中，无法直接访问VPC资源和本机数据。将 Lambda 函数设置为在 VPC 中运行并指派适当的安全组可确保其可通过 Direct Connect 访问本机数据中的资源。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Lambda function runs in the managed environment of AWS by default and cannot directly access VPC resources and local data. Configuring the Lambda function to run in a VPC and assigning the appropriate security group ensures that it can access resources in the local data through Direct Connect.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：标题已经提到公司使用AWS Direct Connect连接本地数据，因此无需设置额外的VPN连接。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The title has mentioned that the company uses AWS Direct Connect to connect to local data, so there is no need to set up an additional VPN connection.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然更新路由表是必要的，但仅更新路由表不足以让 Lambda 函数访问 VPC 资源。 Lambda 函数必须在 VPC 中运作才能使用这些路由。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although updating the routing table is necessary, updating the routing table alone is not sufficient for the Lambda function to access VPC resources. Lambda functions must run in a VPC to use these routes.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：弹性 IP 地址与 Lambda 函数的网络访问无关。 Lambda 函数需要通过 VPC 和安全群组访问本机数据，而不是通过弹性 IP 地址。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Elastic IP address is not relevant for network access of the Lambda function. Lambda functions need to access local data through VPC and security groups, not through Elastic IP addresses.

answer_text.zh: A. 将 Lambda 函数配置为在具有适当安全组的 VPC 中运行。
answer_text.en: A. Configure the Lambda function to run in the VPC with the appropriate security group.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：A (76%) C (24%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Lambda函数缺省运行在AWS的托管环境中，无法直接访问VPC资源和本机数据。将 Lambda 函数设置为在 VPC 中运行并指派适当的安全组可确保其可通过 Direct Connect 访问本机数据中的资源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (76%) C (24%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Lambda function runs in the managed environment of AWS by default and cannot directly access VPC resources and local data. Configuring the Lambda function to run in a VPC and assigning the appropriate security group ensures that it can access resources in the local data through Direct Connect.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon ECS 运行应用程序。该应用程序创建原始图像的调整大小版本，然后进行 Amazon S3 API 调用以将调整大小的图像保存在 Amazon S3 中。解决方案架构师如何确保应用程序有权访问 Amazon S3？
question_text.en: A company runs an application using Amazon ECS. The application creates resized versions of an original image and then makes Amazon S3 API calls to store the resized images in Amazon S3. How can a solutions architect ensure that the application has permission to access Amazon S3?

A.zh: 更新 AWS IAM 中的 S3 角色以允许从 Amazon ECS 进行读取/写入访问，然后重新启动容器。
A.en: Update the S3 role in AWS IAM to allow read/write access from Amazon ECS, and then relaunch the container.

B.zh: 创建具有 S3 权限的 IAM 角色，然后在任务定义中将该角色指定为 taskRoleArn。
B.en: Create an IAM role with S3 permissions, and then specify that role as the taskRoleArn in the task definition.

C.zh: 创建一个允许从 Amazon ECS 访问 Amazon S3 的安全组，并更新 ECS 集群使用的启动配置。
C.en: Create a security group that allows access from Amazon ECS to Amazon S3, and update the launch configuration used by the ECS cluster.

D.zh: 创建具有 S3 权限的 IAM 用户，然后在以此账户登录时重新启动 ECS 集群的 Amazon EC2 实例。
D.en: Create an IAM user with S3 permissions, and then relaunch the Amazon EC2 instances for the ECS cluster while logged in as this account.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：IAM 角色无法直接与 Amazon ECS 关联。 IAM角色需要通过任务定义中的taskRoleArn属性与任务绑定。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM roles cannot be directly associated with Amazon ECS. The IAM role needs to be bound to the task through the taskRoleArn attribute in the task definition.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：这是最佳实践。通过在任务定义中指定 taskRoleArn，ECS 任务可以使用该 IAM 角色来访问 Amazon S3。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This is a best practice. By specifying taskRoleArn in the task definition, the ECS task can use that IAM role to access Amazon S3.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全群组用于控制网络流量，而不是权限管理。无法通过安全组授予 ECS 任务对 S3 的访问权限。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Security groups are used to control network traffic, not permission management. Unable to grant ECS tasks access to S3 via security group.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：IAM 用户是为人类用户或应用编程的，而不是为 ECS 任务设计的。 ECS 任务应使用 IAM 角色而非 IAM 用户。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM users are designed for human users or applications, not for ECS tasks. ECS tasks should use IAM roles instead of IAM users.

answer_text.zh: B. 创建具有 S3 权限的 IAM 角色，然后在任务定义中将该角色指定为 taskRoleArn。
answer_text.en: B. Create an IAM role with S3 permissions, and then specify that role as the taskRoleArn in the task definition.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：这是最佳实践。通过在任务定义中指定 taskRoleArn，ECS 任务可以使用该 IAM 角色来访问 Amazon S3。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This is a best practice. By specifying taskRoleArn in the task definition, the ECS task can use that IAM role to access Amazon S3.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个基于 Windows 的应用程序，必须迁移到 AWS。该应用程序需要使用附加到跨多个可用区部署的多个 Amazon EC2 Windows 实例的共用 Windows 文档系统：解决方案架构师应该如何做才能满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company has a Windows-based application that must be migrated to AWS. The application requires the use of a shared Windows file system attached to multiple Amazon EC2 Windows instances that are deployed across multiple Availability Zone: What should a solutions architect do to meet this requirement?

A.zh: 在卷网关模式下设置 AWS Storage Gateway。将卷加载到每个 Windows 实例。
A.en: Configure AWS Storage Gateway in volume gateway mode. Mount the volume to each Windows instance.

B.zh: 设置 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server。将 Amazon FSx 文档系统挂载到每个 Windows 实例。
B.en: Configure Amazon FSx for Windows File Server. Mount the Amazon FSx file system to each Windows instance.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 设置档系统。将 EFS 文档系统挂载到每个 Windows 实例。
C.en: Configure a file system by using Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS). Mount the EFS file system to each Windows instance.

D.zh: 配置具有所需大小的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷。将每个 EC2 实例附加到卷。将卷内的文档系统装载到每个 Windows 实例。
D.en: Configure an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume with the required size. Attach each EC2 instance to the volume. Mount the file system within the volume to each Windows instance.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Storage Gateway 主要用于混合云端场景，将本机保存与 AWS 云存储集成。它不适合直接作为跨多个可用区的共享文档系统解决方案。此外，卷宗网关模式主要用于区块存储，而不是文档系统共用。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Storage Gateway is mainly used in hybrid cloud scenarios to integrate local storage with AWS cloud storage. It is not suitable directly as a shared file system solution across multiple Availability Zones. Additionally, Volume Gateway mode is primarily used for block storage, not file system sharing.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 是专为 Windows 环境设计的托管文档系统服务。它支持SMB协议，可以提供跨多个可用区的共享文档系统。完全满足题目要求，支持Windows实例之间的文档共用。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server is a managed file system service designed specifically for Windows environments. It supports the SMB protocol and can provide a shared file system across multiple availability zones. It fully meets the question requirements and supports file sharing between Windows instances.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EFS 是专为 Linux 环境设计的文档系统服务，不支持挂载 Windows 实例。因此，EFS无法满足问题中Windows共享文档系统的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EFS is a file system service designed for Linux environments and does not support mounting of Windows instances. Therefore, EFS cannot meet the requirements of the Windows shared file system in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EBS 是一种区块存储服务，不能直接用作共用文档系统。一个EBS卷只能挂载到一个EC2实例上，无法满足多个实例共用文档系统的需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EBS is a block storage service and cannot be used directly as a shared file system. An EBS volume can only be mounted to one EC2 instance, which cannot meet the needs of multiple instances to share the file system.

answer_text.zh: B. 设置 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server。将 Amazon FSx 文档系统挂载到每个 Windows 实例。
answer_text.en: B. Configure Amazon FSx for Windows File Server. Mount the Amazon FSx file system to each Windows instance.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 是专为 Windows 环境设计的托管文档系统服务。它支持SMB协议，可以提供跨多个可用区的共享文档系统。完全满足题目要求，支持Windows实例之间的文档共用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server is a managed file system service designed specifically for Windows environments. It supports the SMB protocol and can provide a shared file system across multiple availability zones. It fully meets the question requirements and supports file sharing between Windows instances.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在开发一个电子商务应用程序，该应用程序由负载平衡前端、基于容器的应用程序和关系数据库组成。解决方案架构师需要创建一个高度可用的解决方案，该解决方案在运行时需要尽可能少的手动干预。哪些解决方案满足这些要求？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A company is developing an ecommerce application that will consist of a load-balanced front end, a container-based application, and a relational database. A solutions architect needs to create a highly available solution that operates with as little manual intervention as possible. Which solutions meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在多可用区模式下创建 Amazon RDS 数据库实例。
A.en: Create an Amazon RDS DB instance in Multi-AZ mode.

B.zh: 在另一个可用区中创建一个 Amazon RDS 数据库实例和一个或多个副本。
B.en: Create an Amazon RDS DB instance and one or more replicas in another Availability Zone.

C.zh: 创建基于 Amazon EC2 实例的 Docker 集群来处理动态应用程序负载。
C.en: Create an Amazon EC2 instance-based Docker cluster to handle the dynamic application load.

D.zh: 使用 Fargate 启动类型创建 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群来处理动态应用程序负载。
D.en: Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster with a Fargate launch type to handle the dynamic application load.

E.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 启动类型创建 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群来处理动态应用程序负载。
E.en: Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster with an Amazon EC2 launch type to handle the dynamic application load.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Multi-AZ模型为数据库提供了高可用和自动故障转移功能，以高可用和最小的努力满足了问题的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Multi-AZ model provides high availability and automatic failover functions for the database, meeting the requirements of the question with high availability and minimal effort.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然跨可用区的副本可以提高读取性能，但它们不提供自动故障转移，因此不能完全满足高可用性要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although replicas across Availability Zones can improve read performance, they do not provide automatic failover and therefore do not fully meet high availability requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EC2实例需要主动管理与扩容，且不符合问题中「减容、主动防范」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 instances require active management and expansion, which does not meet the "volume reduction and active precautions" requirement of the question.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Fargate 是一种无服务器服务器运行模型，自动管理公寓基础设施，满足高可用性和减少干预的要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Fargate is a serverless server running model that automatically manages the apartment infrastructure and meets the requirements of high availability and reduced intervention.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EC2启动类型需要主动管理实例，这不满足问题的「卷减少干预」要求。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The EC2 startup type requires an active management instance, which does not meet the "volume reduction intervention" requirement of the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 在多可用区模式下创建 Amazon RDS 数据库实例。；D. 使用 Fargate 启动类型创建 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群来处理动态应用程序负载。
answer_text.en: A. Create an Amazon RDS DB instance in Multi-AZ mode.; D. Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster with a Fargate launch type to handle the dynamic application load.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：AD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Multi-AZ模型为数据库提供了高可用和自动故障转移功能，以高可用和最小的努力满足了问题的要求。；Fargate 是一种无服务器服务器运行模型，自动管理公寓基础设施，满足高可用性和减少干预的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Multi-AZ model provides high availability and automatic failover functions for the database, meeting the requirements of the question with high availability and minimal effort.; Fargate is a serverless server running model that automatically manages the apartment infrastructure and meets the requirements of high availability and reduced intervention.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon S3 作为其数据湖。该公司有一个新的合作伙伴，必须使用 SFTP 上传数据文档。解决方案架构师需要实施高度可用的 SFTP 解决方案，以最大限度地减少运维开销。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company uses Amazon S3 as its data lake. The company has a new partner that must use SFTP to upload data files. A solutions architect needs to implement a highly available SFTP solution that minimizes operational overhead. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Transfer Family 设置具有可公开访问终端节点的支持 SFTP 的服务器。选择 S3 数据湖作为目标。
A.en: Use AWS Transfer Family to configure an SFTP-enabled server with a publicly accessible endpoint. Choose the S3 data lake as the destination.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 文档网关作为 SFTP 服务器。向新合作伙伴公开 S3 文档网关端点 URL。与新合作伙伴共用 S3 文档网关端点。
B.en: Use Amazon S3 File Gateway as an SFTP server. Expose the S3 File Gateway endpoint URL to the new partner. Share the S3 File Gateway endpoint with the new partner.

C.zh: 在 VPC 的私有子网中启动 Amazon EC2 实例。指示新合作伙伴使用 VPN 将文档上传到 EC2 实例。在 EC2 实例上运行 cron 作业脚本，将文档上传到 S3 数据湖。
C.en: Launch an Amazon EC2 instance in a private subnet in a VPC. Instruct the new partner to upload files to the EC2 instance by using a VPN. Run a cron job script on the EC2 instance to upload files to the S3 data lake.

D.zh: 在 VPC 的私有子网中启动 Amazon EC2 实例。将网络负载均衡器 (NLB) 放置在 EC2 实例前面。为 NLB 创建 SFTP 监听器连接端口。与新合作伙伴共用 NLB 主机名称。在 EC2 实例上运行 cron 作业脚本，将文档上传到 S3 数据湖。
D.en: Launch Amazon EC2 instances in a private subnet in a VPC. Place a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in front of the EC2 instances. Create an SFTP listener port for the NLB. Share the NLB hostname with the new partner. Run a cron job script on the EC2 instances to upload files to the S3 data lake.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Transfer Family 是一项专门设计用于支持 SFTP、FTPS 和 FTP 协定的托管服务，并且可以直接与 Amazon S3 集成。提供高可用性，无需管理公寓级基础设施，满足「最小化运维开销」的要求。可以配置可公开访问的端点以满足合作伙伴的需求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Transfer Family is a managed service specifically designed to support SFTP, FTPS, and FTP protocols and can integrate directly with Amazon S3. It provides high availability and does not require management of apartment-level infrastructure, meeting the requirement of "minimizing operation and maintenance overhead". A publicly accessible endpoint can be configured to meet partner needs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 文档网关是用于将本机文档系统与 Amazon S3 集成的服务，但它不支持 SFTP 协定。无法直接使用 S3 文档网关作为 SFTP 服务器。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 File Gateway is a service for integrating local file systems with Amazon S3, but it does not support the SFTP protocol. Unable to use S3 File Gateway directly as an SFTP server.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然可以通过EC2实例实现SFTP功能，但需要设置和管理服务器，增加了运维开销。使用VPN增加了复杂性，不符合「最小化运维开销」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although the SFTP function can be implemented through the EC2 instance, it requires configuring and managing the server, which increases operation and maintenance overhead. Using VPN adds complexity and does not meet the requirement of "minimizing operation and maintenance overhead".

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然通过NLB和EC2可以实现高可用的SFTP解决方案，但需要主动管理多个EC2实例和负载均衡器，这增加了运维开销。与AWS Transfer Family相比，此解决方案较为复杂，不符合「最小化运维开销」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although a highly available SFTP solution can be achieved through NLB and EC2, multiple EC2 instances and load balancers need to be actively managed, which increases operation and maintenance overhead. Compared with AWS Transfer Family, this solution is complex and does not meet the requirement of "minimizing operation and maintenance overhead".

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Transfer Family 设置具有可公开访问终端节点的支持 SFTP 的服务器。选择 S3 数据湖作为目标。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Transfer Family to configure an SFTP-enabled server with a publicly accessible endpoint. Choose the S3 data lake as the destination.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Transfer Family 是一项专门设计用于支持 SFTP、FTPS 和 FTP 协定的托管服务，并且可以直接与 Amazon S3 集成。提供高可用性，无需管理公寓级基础设施，满足「最小化运维开销」的要求。可以配置可公开访问的端点以满足合作伙伴的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Transfer Family is a managed service specifically designed to support SFTP, FTPS, and FTP protocols and can integrate directly with Amazon S3. It provides high availability and does not require management of apartment-level infrastructure, meeting the requirement of "minimizing operation and maintenance overhead". A publicly accessible endpoint can be configured to meet partner needs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要保存合约文档。合约期限为 5 年。 5年内，公司必须确保文档不会被覆盖或删除。该公司需要对静态文档进行加密，并每年自动轮换加密密钥。解决方案架构师应采取哪种步骤组合才能以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A company needs to store contract documents. A contract lasts for 5 years. During the 5-year period, the company must ensure that the documents cannot be overwritten or deleted. The company needs to encrypt the documents at rest and rotate the encryption keys automatically every year. Which combination of steps should a solutions architect take to meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 将文档保存在 Amazon S3 中。在治理模式下使用 S3 对象锁。
A.en: Store the documents in Amazon S3. Use S3 Object Lock in governance mode.

B.zh: 将文档保存在 Amazon S3 中。在合规模式下使用 S3 对象锁定。
B.en: Store the documents in Amazon S3. Use S3 Object Lock in compliance mode.

C.zh: 使用具有 Amazon S3 托管加密密钥 (SSE-S3) 的服务器端加密。配置密钥轮换。
C.en: Use server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3). Configure key rotation.

D.zh: 通过 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 用户管理的密钥使用服务器端加密。配置密钥轮换。
D.en: Use server-side encryption with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed keys. Configure key rotation.

E.zh: 通过 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客户提供（导入）的密钥使用服务器端加密。配置密钥轮换。
E.en: Use server-side encryption with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer provided (imported) keys. Configure key rotation.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：治理模式允许管理员绕过锁定规则，这不符合问题所要求的「确保文档不能被覆盖或删除」的严格合规性要求。因此这个选项是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Governance mode allows administrators to bypass locking rules, which does not meet the strict compliance requirement of "ensuring files cannot be overwritten or deleted" required by the question. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：合规模式可确保文档无法被覆写或删除，甚至管理员也无法绕过锁定规则。此选项符合题目要求，是。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Compliance mode ensures that files cannot be overwritten or deleted, and even administrators cannot bypass locking rules. This option meets the question requirements and is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：SSE-S3 使用 Amazon S3 管理的加密密钥，但不支持用户控制的密钥轮换。问题要求每年自动轮换加密密钥，所以这个选项是。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SSE-S3 uses Amazon S3-managed encryption keys, but it does not support user-controlled key rotation. The question requires automatic rotation of encryption keys every year, so this option is.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：旋转。 AWS KMS 客户管理的密钥支持自动密钥轮换，满足问题要求。这个选项是。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: rotation. AWS KMS customer-managed keys support automatic key rotation, which meets the question requirements. This option is.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：配置密钥轮换。客户提供的密钥需要手动管理密钥轮换，不支持自动轮换。题目要求自动轮换加密密钥，所以这个选项是。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Configure key rotation. Customer-provided keys require manual management of key rotation and automatic rotation is not supported. The question requires automatic rotation of encryption keys, so this option is.

answer_text.zh: B. 将文档保存在 Amazon S3 中。在合规模式下使用 S3 对象锁定。；D. 通过 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 用户管理的密钥使用服务器端加密。配置密钥轮换。
answer_text.en: B. Store the documents in Amazon S3. Use S3 Object Lock in compliance mode.; D. Use server-side encryption with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed keys. Configure key rotation.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：BD (79%) BC (20%) 1。热门讨论与考点摘要：合规模式可确保文档无法被覆写或删除，甚至管理员也无法绕过锁定规则。此选项符合题目要求，是。；旋转。 AWS KMS 客户管理的密钥支持自动密钥轮换，满足问题要求。这个选项是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (79%) BC (20%) 1. Popular discussion and key point summary: Compliance mode ensures that files cannot be overwritten or deleted, and even administrators cannot bypass locking rules. This option meets the question requirements and is.; rotation. AWS KMS customer-managed keys support automatic key rotation, which meets the question requirements. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个基于 Java 和 PHP 的 Web 应用程序。该公司计划将应用程序从本地迁移到 AWS。该公司需要能够经常测试新网站功能。该公司还需要一个高度可用且托管的解决方案，并且需要最小的运维开销。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has a web application that is based on Java and PHP. The company plans to move the application from on premises to AWS. The company needs the ability to test new site features frequently. The company also needs a highly available and managed solution that requires minimum operational overhead. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 创建 Amazon S3 存储桶。在 S3 存储桶上启用静态 Web 托管。将静态内容上传到 S3 存储桶。使用 AWS Lambda 处理所有动态内容。
A.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Enable static web hosting on the S3 bucket. Upload the static content to the S3 bucket. Use AWS Lambda to process all dynamic content.

B.zh: 将 Web 应用程序部署到 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 环境。使用 URL 交换在多个 Elastic Beanstalk 环境之间切换以进行功能测试。
B.en: Deploy the web application to an AWS Elastic Beanstalk environment. Use URL swapping to switch between multiple Elastic Beanstalk environments for feature testing.

C.zh: 将 Web 应用程序部署到使用 Java 和 PHP 配置的 Amazon EC2 实例。使用 Auto Scaling 群组和 Application Load Balancer 来管理网站的可用性。
C.en: Deploy the web application to Amazon EC2 instances that are configured with Java and PHP. Use Auto Scaling groups and an Application Load Balancer to manage the website’s availability.

D.zh: 将 Web 应用程序容器化。将 Web 应用程序部署到 Amazon EC2 实例。使用 AWS 负载均衡器控制器在包含新站点功能的容器之间动态路由流量以进行测试。
D.en: Containerize the web application. Deploy the web application to Amazon EC2 instances. Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to dynamically route traffic between containers that contain the new site features for testing.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3适合托管静态网站，但本题的应用是基于Java和PHP的动态网站，S3无法直接支持动态内容。虽然使用AWS Lambda处理动态内容是可行的，但会增加开发复杂性，且不符合「最小运维开销」的要求。结论：这个选项是错的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: ness analysis: Amazon S3 is suitable for hosting static websites, but the application in this question is a dynamic website based on Java and PHP, and S3 cannot directly support dynamic content. Although using AWS Lambda to process dynamic content is feasible, it will increase development complexity and does not meet the "minimum operational overhead" requirement. Conclusion: This option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Elastic Beanstalk是一项托管服务，支持Java和PHP应用程序，可自动处理部署、负载平衡和扩展，并满足「最低运维开销」的要求。 URL交换功能可在多个环境之间快速切换，满足频繁测试新功能的需求。结论：这个选项是。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: ness analysis: AWS Elastic Beanstalk is a managed service that supports Java and PHP applications, can automatically handle deployment, load balancing and scaling, and meets the requirements of "minimum operational overhead". The URL exchange function allows quick switching between multiple environments to meet the needs of frequent testing of new features. Conclusion: This option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然EC2实例可以支持Java和PHP应用，且Auto Scaling和ALB可以提供高可用性，但需要手动管理实例配置和部署，增加了运维开销。结论：这个选项是错的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: ness analysis: Although EC2 instances can support Java and PHP applications, and Auto Scaling and ALB can provide high availability, manual management of instance configuration and deployment is required, increasing operational overhead. Conclusion: This option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：容器化部署需要额外的容器管理工具（如EKS或ECS），而手动管理EC2实例和容器会增加运维开销。虽然可以动态路由流量进行测试，但复杂度较高，不符合「最小运维开销」的要求。结论：这个选项是错的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: ness analysis: Containerized deployment requires additional container management tools (such as EKS or ECS), and manual management of EC2 instances and containers increases operational overhead. Although traffic can be dynamically routed for testing, the complexity is high and does not meet the "minimum operational overhead" requirement. Conclusion: This option is wrong.

answer_text.zh: B. 将 Web 应用程序部署到 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 环境。使用 URL 交换在多个 Elastic Beanstalk 环境之间切换以进行功能测试。
answer_text.en: B. Deploy the web application to an AWS Elastic Beanstalk environment. Use URL swapping to switch between multiple Elastic Beanstalk environments for feature testing.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：B (94%) 6%。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Elastic Beanstalk是一项托管服务，支持Java和PHP应用程序，可自动处理部署、负载平衡和扩展，并满足「最低运维开销」的要求。 URL交换功能可在多个环境之间快速切换，满足频繁测试新功能的需求。结论：这个选项是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (94%) 6%. Popular discussion and key point summary: ness analysis: AWS Elastic Beanstalk is a managed service that supports Java and PHP applications, can automatically handle deployment, load balancing and scaling, and meets the requirements of "minimum operational overhead". The URL exchange function allows quick switching between multiple environments to meet the needs of frequent testing of new features. Conclusion: This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个订购应用程序，该应用程序将客户信息保存在 Amazon RDS for MySQL 中。在正常工作时间内，员工会出于报告目的运行一次性查找。订单处理期间发生逾时，因为报表查找需要很长时间才能运行。公司需要在不阻止员工运行查找的情况下消除逾时。解决方案架构师应该怎么做才能满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an ordering application that stores customer information in Amazon RDS for MySQL. During regular business hours, employees run one-time queries for reporting purposes. Timeouts are occurring during order processing because the reporting queries are taking a long time to run. The company needs to eliminate the timeouts without preventing employees from performing queries. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 创建只读副本。将报表查找移至只读副本。
A.en: Create a read replica. Move reporting queries to the read replica.

B.zh: 创建只读副本。将排序应用程序分发到主数据库实例和只读副本。
B.en: Create a read replica. Distribute the ordering application to the primary DB instance and the read replica.

C.zh: 将订购应用程序迁移到具有按需容量的 Amazon DynamoDB。
C.en: Migrate the ordering application to Amazon DynamoDB with on-demand capacity.

D.zh: 安排非尖峰时段的报告查找。
D.en: Schedule the reporting queries for non-peak hours.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：创建只读副本可以有效分担主数据库实例的读取压力。将报表查找移至只读副本可防止主实例因高查找负载而逾时。这是解决读写分离问题的最佳实践。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Creating a read replica can effectively share the read pressure of the primary database instance. Moving reporting queries to the read replica prevents the primary instance from timing out due to high query load. This is a best practice for solving read-write separation issues.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：只读副本是只读的，无法处理写入。订阅应用程序需要写入数据，因此无法指派给只读副本。该选项不满足实际需求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The read replica is read-only and cannot handle writes. Subscribing application programs require writing data and therefore cannot be assigned to read replicas. This option does not meet actual needs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：尽管 DynamoDB 是高性能 NoSQL 数据库，但迁移到 DynamoDB 需要对应用程序进行重大变更。问题没有提到需要改变数据库类型，所以这个选项不符合要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although DynamoDB is a high-performance NoSQL database, migrating to DynamoDB requires significant changes to the application program. The question does not mention the need to change the database type, so this option does not meet the requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然安排查找在非尖峰时段运行可以减轻主实例的压力，但它并不能完全解决问题。员工可能需要随时运行查找，因此该选项无法满足需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While scheduling queries to run during off-peak hours can reduce stress on the master instance, it does not completely solve the problem. Employees may need to run queries at any time, so this option does not meet the needs.

answer_text.zh: A. 创建只读副本。将报表查找移至只读副本。
answer_text.en: A. Create a read replica. Move reporting queries to the read replica.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：创建只读副本可以有效分担主数据库实例的读取压力。将报表查找移至只读副本可防止主实例因高查找负载而逾时。这是解决读写分离问题的最佳实践。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Creating a read replica can effectively share the read pressure of the primary database instance. Moving reporting queries to the read replica prevents the primary instance from timing out due to high query load. This is a best practice for solving read-write separation issues.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家医院想要为其大量历史书面记录创建数字副本。医院每天将继续增加数百份新文档。医院的数据团队将扫描文档并将文档上传到AWS云端。解决方案架构师必须实作一个解决方案来分析文档、提取医疗信息并保存文档，以便应用程序可以对数据运行 SQL 查找。此解决方案必须最大限度地提高可扩展性和运维效率。解决方案架构师应该采取哪些步骤组合来满足这些要求？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A hospital wants to create digital copies for its large collection of historical written records. The hospital will continue to add hundreds of new documents each day. The hospital’s data team will scan the documents and will upload the documents to the AWS Cloud. A solutions architect must implement a solution to analyze the documents, extract the medical information, and store the documents so that an application can run SQL queries on the data. The solution must maximize scalability and operational efficiency. Which combination of steps should the solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 将文档信息写入运行 MySQL 数据库的 Amazon EC2 实例。
A.en: Write the document information to an Amazon EC2 instance that runs a MySQL database.

B.zh: 将文档信息写入 Amazon S3 存储桶。使用 Amazon Athena 查找数据。
B.en: Write the document information to an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to query the data.

C.zh: 创建 Amazon EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling 群组以运行处理扫描文档并截取医疗信息的自订应用程序。
C.en: Create an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances to run a custom application that processes the scanned files and extracts the medical information.

D.zh: 创建一个在上传新文档时运行的 AWS Lambda 函数。使用 Amazon Rekognition 将文档转换为原始文本。使用 Amazon Transcribe Medical 从文本中检测并提取相关医疗信息。
D.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that runs when new documents are uploaded. Use Amazon Rekognition to convert the documents to raw text. Use Amazon Transcribe Medical to detect and extract relevant medical information from the text.

E.zh: 创建一个在上传新文档时运行的 AWS Lambda 函数。使用 Amazon Textract 将文档转换为原始文本。使用 Amazon Comprehend Medical 从文本中侦测并提取相关医疗信息。
E.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that runs when new documents are uploaded. Use Amazon Textract to convert the documents to raw text. Use Amazon Comprehend Medical to detect and extract relevant medical information from the text.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用EC2实例运行MySQL数据库不符合「最大化可可扩展性和运作效率」的要求。 EC2需要人工管理，而MySQL在处理大规模数据时可能不如S3和Athena有效率。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using an EC2 instance to run a MySQL database does not meet the requirements of "maximizing scalability and operational efficiency". EC2 requires manual management, and MySQL may not be as efficient as S3 and Athena when handling large-scale data.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon S3 提供高可扩展性和低成本存储，适合保存大量文档。 Amazon Athena可以直接查找S3中保存的数据，支持SQL查找，满足提问要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon S3 provides high scalability and low-cost storage, suitable for storing large amounts of documents. Amazon Athena can directly query data stored in S3, supports SQL query, and meets the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用EC2实例运行自订应用程序需要手动管理和维护，增加了操作复杂度，不符合「运维效率最大化」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using EC2 instances to run custom applications requires manual management and maintenance, which increases operational complexity and does not meet the requirement of "maximizing operational efficiency".

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Rekognition 主要用于影像和视频分析，不适合文档文本截取。 Amazon Transcribe Medical 用于语音转录，不适合从文档中提取医疗信息。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Rekognition is mainly used for image and video analysis and is not suitable for document text extraction. Amazon Transcribe Medical is used for speech transcription and is not suitable for extracting medical information from documents.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Lambda 可以自动触发上传文档的处理，Amazon Textract 可以从文档中提取文本，Amazon Comprehend Medical 可以从文本中提取医疗信息，满足问题的要求。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Lambda can automatically trigger processing of uploaded documents, Amazon Textract can extract text from documents, and Amazon Comprehend Medical can extract medical information from text, which meets the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 将文档信息写入 Amazon S3 存储桶。使用 Amazon Athena 查找数据。；E. 创建一个在上传新文档时运行的 AWS Lambda 函数。使用 Amazon Textract 将文档转换为原始文本。使用 Amazon Comprehend Medical 从文本中侦测并提取相关医疗信息。
answer_text.en: B. Write the document information to an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to query the data.; E. Create an AWS Lambda function that runs when new documents are uploaded. Use Amazon Textract to convert the documents to raw text. Use Amazon Comprehend Medical to detect and extract relevant medical information from the text.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：BE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon S3 提供高可扩展性和低成本存储，适合保存大量文档。 Amazon Athena可以直接查找S3中保存的数据，支持SQL查找，满足提问要求。；AWS Lambda 可以自动触发上传文档的处理，Amazon Textract 可以从文档中提取文本，Amazon Comprehend Medical 可以从文本中提取医疗信息，满足问题的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 provides high scalability and low-cost storage, suitable for storing large amounts of documents. Amazon Athena can directly query data stored in S3, supports SQL query, and meets the question requirements.; AWS Lambda can automatically trigger processing of uploaded documents, Amazon Textract can extract text from documents, and Amazon Comprehend Medical can extract medical information from text, which meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行批量应用程序。该应用程序由具有多个 Amazon RDS 数据库的后端组成。该应用程序导致对数据库的大量读取。解决方案架构师必须减少数据库读取次数，同时确保高可用性。解决方案架构师应该做什么来满足这个要求？
question_text.en: A company is running a batch application on Amazon EC2 instances. The application consists of a backend with multiple Amazon RDS databases. The application is causing a high number of reads on the databases. A solutions architect must reduce the number of database reads while ensuring high availability. What should the solutions architect do to meet this requirement?

A.zh: 添加 Amazon RDS 只读副本。
A.en: Add Amazon RDS read replicas.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis。
B.en: Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Route 53 DNS 缓存
C.en: Use Amazon Route 53 DNS caching

D.zh: 使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached。
D.en: Use Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon RDS 只读副本可以有效降低主数据库的读取压力，同时提供高可用性。只读副本专门设计用于处理高读取负载场景。满足问题的要求：减少数据库读取次数，确保高可用。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon RDS read replicas can effectively reduce the read pressure on the primary database while providing high availability. Read replicas are specifically designed to handle high read load scenarios. Meet the requirements of the question: reduce the number of database reads and ensure high availability.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然Redis可以作为缓存层来减轻数据库读取压力，但问题中并没有提到应用程序支持Redis或需要复杂的缓存逻辑。 Redis适用于需要高性能缓存的场景，但它并不会直接提供数据库的高可用功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Redis can be used as a caching layer to reduce database read pressure, the question does not mention that the application supports Redis or requires complex caching logic. Redis is suitable for scenarios that require high-performance caching, but it does not directly provide the high-availability function of the database.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Route 53 DNS缓存主要用于优化网域名称解析速度，与减少数据库读取次数无关。不符合问题要求：无法直接解决数据库读取压力问题。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Route 53 DNS cache is mainly used to optimize domain name resolution speed and has nothing to do with reducing the number of database reads. Does not meet the requirements of the question: it cannot directly solve the problem of database reading pressure.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Memcached与Redis类似，可以作为缓存层，减轻数据库读取压力，但问题中没有提到应用程序支持Memcached。 Memcached也不直接提供数据库的高可用功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Memcached is similar to Redis and can be used as a cache layer to reduce database reading pressure, but the question does not mention that the application supports Memcached. Memcached also does not directly provide the high availability functionality of the database.

answer_text.zh: A. 添加 Amazon RDS 只读副本。
answer_text.en: A. Add Amazon RDS read replicas.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：A (60%) B (40%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon RDS 只读副本可以有效降低主数据库的读取压力，同时提供高可用性。只读副本专门设计用于处理高读取负载场景。满足问题的要求：减少数据库读取次数，确保高可用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (60%) B (40%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon RDS read replicas can effectively reduce the read pressure on the primary database while providing high availability. Read replicas are specifically designed to handle high read load scenarios. Meet the requirements of the question: reduce the number of database reads and ensure high availability.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在 AWS 上运行关键应用程序。该公司需要使用 Amazon EC2 作为应用程序的数据库。数据库必须具有高可用性，并且在发生破坏性事件时必须自动进行故障转移。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to run a critical application on AWS. The company needs to use Amazon EC2 for the application’s database. The database must be highly available and must fail over automatically if a disruptive event occurs. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 启动两个 EC2 实例，每个实例位于同一 AWS 区域的不同可用区。在两个 EC2 实例上安装数据库。将 EC2 实例配置为集群。设置数据库复制。
A.en: Launch two EC2 instances, each in a different Availability Zone in the same AWS Region. Install the database on both EC2 instances. Configure the EC2 instances as a cluster. Set up database replication.

B.zh: 在可用区中启动 EC2 实例。在 EC2 实例上安装数据库。使用 Amazon 系统映像 (AMI) 备份数据。如果发生中断事件，使用 AWS CloudFormation 自动预置 EC2 实例。
B.en: Launch an EC2 instance in an Availability Zone. Install the database on the EC2 instance. Use an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) to back up the data. Use AWS CloudFormation to automate provisioning of the EC2 instance if a disruptive event occurs.

C.zh: 启动两个 EC2 实例，每个实例位于不同的 AWS 区域。在两个 EC2 实例上安装数据库。设置数据库复制。将数据库故障转移到第二个区域。
C.en: Launch two EC2 instances, each in a different AWS Region. Install the database on both EC2 instances. Set up database replication. Fail over the database to a second Region.

D.zh: 在可用区中启动 EC2 实例。在 EC2 实例上安装数据库。使用 Amazon 系统映像 (AMI) 备份数据。如果发生中断事件，使用 EC2 自动恢复来恢复实例。
D.en: Launch an EC2 instance in an Availability Zone. Install the database on the EC2 instance. Use an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) to back up the data. Use EC2 automatic recovery to recover the instance if a disruptive event occurs.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：此选项符合高可用性要求，因为它在同一区域的不同可用区中间托管两个 EC2 实例，并设置数据库复制和集群配置。这样可以确保当一个可用区发生故障时，另一可用区的实例仍能顺利运作。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option meets high availability requirements because it hosts two EC2 instances in the middle of different Availability Zones in the same region and sets up database replication and cluster configuration. This ensures that if one Availability Zone fails, instances in another Availability Zone can run smoothly.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项仅在可用区中间配置 EC2 实例，且不提供跨可用区的高可用性。虽然使用 AMI 和 CloudFormation 可以实现快速恢复，但这不是自动故障转移，也不能满足高可用性要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option only provisions an EC2 instance in the middle of an Availability Zone and does not provide high availability across Availability Zones. While fast recovery is possible using AMIs and CloudFormation, this is not an automatic failover and does not meet high availability requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然跨区域复制可以提供灾难恢复，但它并不是一个高可用性解决方案。跨区域故障转移通常需要人工干预，且延迟较高，因此自动故障转移并不能满足问题的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although cross-region replication can provide disaster recovery, it is not a high-availability solution. Cross-region failover usually requires manual intervention and has high latency, so automatic failover does not meet the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EC2自动恢复仅适用于特定实例的故障（例如硬件故障），不适用于特定于可用区的故障。此外，此选项不具有跨可用区组件，无法满足高可用性要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 automatic recovery only applies to instance-specific faults (such as hardware failures), not availability zone-specific faults. Additionally, this option does not have cross-Availability Zone components and cannot meet high availability requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 启动两个 EC2 实例，每个实例位于同一 AWS 区域的不同可用区。在两个 EC2 实例上安装数据库。将 EC2 实例配置为集群。设置数据库复制。
answer_text.en: A. Launch two EC2 instances, each in a different Availability Zone in the same AWS Region. Install the database on both EC2 instances. Configure the EC2 instances as a cluster. Set up database replication.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始显示：A (63%) C (37%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：此选项符合高可用性要求，因为它在同一区域的不同可用区中间托管两个 EC2 实例，并设置数据库复制和集群配置。这样可以确保当一个可用区发生故障时，另一可用区的实例仍能顺利运作。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (63%) C (37%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option meets high availability requirements because it hosts two EC2 instances in the middle of different Availability Zones in the same region and sets up database replication and cluster configuration. This ensures that if one Availability Zone fails, instances in another Availability Zone can run smoothly.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司的订单系统将客户端的请求发送至 Amazon EC2 实例。 EC2 实例处理订单，然后将订单保存在 Amazon RDS 上的数据库中。用户报告说，当系统出现故障时，他们必须重新处理订单。该公司需要一种弹性解决方案，能够在系统发生故障时自动处理订单。解决方案架构师应该怎么做才能满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company’s order system sends requests from clients to Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances process the orders and then store the orders in a database on Amazon RDS. Users report that they must reprocess orders when the system fails. The company wants a resilient solution that can process orders automatically if a system outage occurs. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将 EC2 实例移至 Auto Scaling 组中。创建 Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) 规则以定位 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 任务。
A.en: Move the EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling group. Create an Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) rule to target an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task.

B.zh: 将 EC2 实例移至应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的 Auto Scaling 群组中。更新订单系统以将消息发送到 ALB 端点。
B.en: Move the EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Update the order system to send messages to the ALB endpoint.

C.zh: 将 EC2 实例移至 Auto Scaling 组中。配置订单系统以将消息发送至 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。配置 EC2 实例以使用队列中的消息。
C.en: Move the EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling group. Configure the order system to send messages to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure the EC2 instances to consume messages from the queue.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。创建 AWS Lambda 函数，并将该函数订阅 SNS 主题。配置订单系统以向 SNS 主题发送消息。使用 AWS Systems Manager Run Command 向 EC2 实例发送命令以处理消息。
D.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Create an AWS Lambda function, and subscribe the function to the SNS topic. Configure the order system to send messages to the SNS topic. Send a command to the EC2 instances to process the messages by using AWS Systems Manager Run Command.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：以 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 任务为目标。分析：将 EC2 实例移至 Auto Scaling 群中是正确的，因为它提供了弹性和高可用性。使用EventBridge和ECS任务不适合解决订单垃圾邮件的消息处理问题。 EventBridge主要用在事件驱动架构中，使用ECS任务并没有明确解决消息持久化的问题。此选项没有提及如何处理消息持久化和重试机制，因此不符合要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: to target an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task. Analysis: Moving EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling swarm is correct because it provides resiliency and high availability. Using EventBridge and ECS tasks is not suitable for solving the message processing problem of order spam. EventBridge is mainly used in event-driven architecture, and the use of ECS tasks does not explicitly solve the problem of message persistence. This option makes no mention of how message persistence and retry mechanisms are handled, and therefore does not meet the requirements. Conclusion: Wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：系统将消息发送到 ALB 端点。分析：将 EC2 实例移至 Auto Scaling 群组是正确的做法，因为它提供了弹性和高可用性。使用 ALB 作为消息传递的入口点不适合特定于订单的需求。 ALB主要用于处理HTTP/HTTPS请求，不是消息队列的功能。此选项没有解决消息的持久化问题，也没有提供重试机制，因此不符合要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: system to send messages to the ALB endpoint. Analysis: Moving EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling group is the right thing to do because it provides resiliency and high availability. Using ALB as the entry point for messaging is not suitable for order-specific needs. ALB is mainly used to process HTTP/HTTPS requests and is not a function of the message queue. This option does not address the persistence of messages or provide a retry mechanism, so it does not meet the requirements. Conclusion: Wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：队列服务 (Amazon SQS) 队列。配置 EC2 实例以使用队列中的消息。分析：将 EC2 实例移至 Auto Scaling 群组是正确的做法，因为它提供了弹性和高可用性。使用 Amazon SQS 队列可确保消息持久性并提供重试机制，适合处理订单中断。 EC2实例可以消费来自SQS队列的消息，确保即使服务器发生故障，消息仍可被处理。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure the EC2 instances to consume messages from the queue. Analysis: Moving the EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling group is the right thing to do because it provides resiliency and high availability. Using Amazon SQS queues ensures message durability and provides a retry mechanism, suitable for handling order interruptions. EC2 instances can consume messages from SQS queues, ensuring that even if a server fails, messages can still be processed. Conclusion:.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：功能到SNS主题。配置订单系统以向 SNS 主题发送消息。通过 Systems Manager Run Command 向 EC2 实例发送命令处理消息的方法较为复杂，不适合订单处理需求。此选项不解决消息的持久性问题，因此不满足要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: function to the SNS topic. Configure the order system to send messages to the SNS topic. The method of sending command processing messages to EC2 instances through Systems Manager Run Command is complex and not suitable for order processing needs. This option does not address the persistence of messages and therefore does not meet the requirements. Conclusion: Wrong.

answer_text.zh: C. 将 EC2 实例移至 Auto Scaling 组中。配置订单系统以将消息发送至 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。配置 EC2 实例以使用队列中的消息。
answer_text.en: C. Move the EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling group. Configure the order system to send messages to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure the EC2 instances to consume messages from the queue.
